Subject: MV PORT EVERGLADES 63,300 MT OPEN MULDWARKA (WCI) 10-14 DEC 2025
 
-/ Maisam
PLS PROPOSE SUITABLE ORDER FOR BELOW TONNAGE
 
MV PORT EVERGLADES 63,300 MT OPEN MULDWARKA (WCI) 10-14 DEC 2025 
 
EXPECTED ROB:  HSFO ABOUT 580 MT, VLSFO ABOUT 175 MT & LSMGO ABOUT 120 MT  
 
PRESENT CARGO: PET COKE IN BULK
 
PREVIOUS CARGOES: COPPER SLAG IN BULK, IRON ORE FINE IN BULK, LIMESTONE,
COAL, LIMESTONE ,COAL,LIMESTONE,COAL,LIMESTONE 
 
PREVIOUS PORT CALLS: DAVANT/THEODORE /KANDA/NIHAMA/DANDONG/DHAMRA /
CHITTAGONG/ DIBBA/FUJAIRAH/NAVLAKHI

PREF VOY BIZ, TRY TCT. 
NO RED SEA 

MV PORT EVERGLADES (OPEN LOOP TYPE SCRUBBER FITTED)
BUILT/FLAG/BUILT: 2023/PANAMA/IMABARI SHIPBUILDING
DWT/DRAFT : 63,300MT/13.52M SSW
LOA/BEAM : 199.90 M/32.24M
GRT /NRT : 36,600MT / 21151MT TPC 61.5
CLASS : NK
HATCH/HOLD : 5 HATCH/5 HOLD
HATCHSIZE:
(H1) 18.40M X 18.72M
(H2 - H5) 23.20M X 18.72M
GRAIN CAPA:
HOLD - 1 : 14,747.46
              2 : 16,726.11
              3 : 16,716.25
              4 : 16,742.46
              5 : 16, 183.68
        TOTAL 81,115.96 M3
CRANE: 35 MT X 4 SETS
GRAB: 4 GRABS

SPEED/CONSUMPTION
(UNDER THE GOOD WEATHER CONDITION ALWAYS UPTO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT SCALE 4
AND
DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENT AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE
OF SWELL.):

AT SEA:
BALLAST: ABOUT 13.8KNOTS ON ABOUT 25.6MT IFO(380CST) AND ABOUT 0.2MT MDO
LADEN : ABOUT 13.0KNOTS ON ABOUT 25.6MT IFO(380CST) AND ABOUT 0.2MT MDO

ECO SPEED/CONSUMPTION (GUIDANCE/REFERENCE ONLY, WOG)
BALLAST: ABOUT 12.0KNOTS ON ABOUT 16.3MT IFO(380CST) AND ABOUT 0.2MT MDO
LADEN : ABOUT 12.0KNOTS ON ABOUT 19.6MT  IFO(380CST) AND ABOUT 0.2MT MDO

In good weather conditions I,e. in winds up to Beaufort Force 4 and height
of swell up to Douglas scale 3, no swell nor adverse current and clean
bottom.

Bunker grade: IFO(IF - 380CST) ISO 8217(2010 or 2017) RMG380 and MGO
ISO 8217(2010 or 2017) DMA
or MDO ISO 8217(2010 or 2017) DMB shall be supplied, but each of bunkers
stipulated in this clause shall not be commingled.

IN PORT:
IDLE ABOUT 2.0MT IFO AND ABOUT 1.1MT MDO
WORKING ABOUT 4.1MT IFO AND ABOUT 1.2MT MDO

VESSEL HAS LIBERTY TO BURN ADDITIONAL IFO AND/OR MDO WHILE MANOEUVERING,
ALSO WHILST IN RESTRICTED OR CONFINED WATERS OR DURING WINTER.

Vessel Has Liberty to burn MDO at Port/Area where Open Loop Scrubber is not
allowed.
 
ALL DETAILS ABOUT
